meta.note: Additive delta – unifies pricing/intake without removing old fields

estimate_disclaimers.flat_fee: This price is final for the described labor unless the scope changes on site. Materials (if any) are extra and will be confirmed before work begins.
estimate_disclaimers.hourly: This price is final for the described labor unless the scope changes on site. Materials (if any) are extra and will be confirmed before work begins.
estimate_disclaimers.project_based: All estimates are preliminary and non‑binding. Your final, binding price will be confirmed after our technician inspects the job site and you approve the exact scope and material selections. You are not committed until you accept the final quote.

access.question: How easy is it to reach the work area?

client_response.label: Open and easy – plenty of room
Very cramped or hard to reach

appliance_type.question: What kind of appliance is it?

client_response.label: Not sure – I’ll describe in the notes

bulb_count.question: How many light bulbs need attention?

component.question: Which part of the computer needs work?

damage_type.question: What kind of surface damage is it?

distance.question: About how far does the wiring or cable need to run?

dmg_count.question: How many damaged areas are there?

dmg_size.question: How large is the damaged area?

client_response.label: Medium (about the size of a sheet of paper)
Large (bigger than a sheet of paper)

door_size.question: Do you know the size of the door?

client_response.label: I don’t know – the tech can measure on site

door_style_pref.question: What style of door do you prefer? (This helps estimate material cost.)

door_type.question: Is this an exterior door or patio door?

ducting.question: Does the range hood have ducting to the outside?

client_response.label: Not sure – I’ll describe in notes

existing_box.question: Is there already a ceiling fan‑rated electrical box?

client_response.label: Yes, a fan box is already there
No / I’m not sure (may need a new box)

existing_frame.question: Has the old door and frame already been removed?

existing_type.question: What type of connection does the existing faucet have?

client_response.label: Not sure – the tech can check (may add time)

extender_count.question: How many WiFi extenders do you need set up?

faucet_type.question: What type of faucet is it?

fixture_type.question: What kind of light fixture is it?

floor_type.question: What type of flooring is underneath?

furn_item.question: What type of furniture is it?

hardware_type.question: What type of door hardware needs attention?

install_type.question: Is this a new installation or a replacement?

issue.question: What seems to be the problem with the furniture?

client_response.label: Drawer that sticks or falls out

item_type.question: What type of furniture needs assembly?

items.question: What kind of items are we mounting on the wall?

leak_loc.question: Where does the leak seem to be coming from?

client_response.label: Not sure – I’ll describe in notes

length.question: About how long is the cable run or area?

outlet_count.question: How many electrical outlets need work?

plug_count.question: How many smart plugs need to be set up?

removal.question: Do you need the old item removed and taken away?

client_response.label: Yes, remove but leave it for me

screen_count.question: How many window screens need repair or replacement?

Setup.question: What type of setup are we working on?

sink_type.question: What kind of sink is it?

source.question: What is the source of the problem?

space_ready.question: Is the space cleared and ready for work?

client_response.label: No, there’s some clutter or furniture
Not sure – I’ll describe in notes

state.question: What’s the current state of the device?

switch_count.question: How many light switches need work?

symptom.question: What’s the issue with the appliance?

thermostat_type.question: What type of thermostat is it?

tile_count.question: How many tiles need to be repaired or replaced?

toilet_style_pref.question: What type of toilet are you installing?

client_response.label: I already have the toilet – just install it

type.question: What type of washing machine is it?

wall_type.question: What kind of wall are we drilling into?

weight.question: About how heavy is the item?

window_type.question: What style of window is it?

client_response.label: Not sure – describe in notes (may add time)

surface_type.question: What surface or material needs repair?

waterproof_area.question: Is the repair in a wet area like a shower or tub surround?

has_matching_tiles.question: Do you have replacement tiles available on site?

install_target.question: What are we installing or replacing?

mounting_item.question: What are we mounting on the wall?

tech_device.question: What type of device is it?

scope_count.question: How many items are we working on?

project_scale.question: What’s the overall size of this project?

client_response.label: Moderate – standard repair, a few items
Major – extensive damage or large area

client_supplying_door.question: Are you supplying the door yourself?

client_response.label: No, I need you to procure it

contextual_overrides.note: Bidet attachment only, not full toilet install

default_fallback.note: Generic 'Other' job – uses repair base rate

answers.has_pets: Yes, and they may be loose

answers.furniture_complexity: Yes, but it's a complex item (e.g., PAX, sectional)

answers.fan_box_present: No, it's a light fixture now
